violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The dishwasher located in the kitchen area was not operating in good repair. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of debris. Non-Food contact surfaces must be maintained. The non food contact surfaces of the cooking line serving window have an accumulation of food residue, and debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The hot water faucet at the hand sink by the dishwasher was in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2025
Refrigerator door gasket on the two door stand up were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2024
The door to the employee toilet room opens into the food prep area is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
